_note: Single-number capability aggregate (a normalized mean of capability benchmarks — built the same way as Raidex's RAI Score). Keyed by Raidex model_name (the leaderboard 'Model' column). Models without a published score on this snapshot's index version are omitted rather than mixed across versions: claude-haiku-4-5, mistral-large-latest, Meta-Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507.
